name: jat13
description: JAT 13 — job auto-apply: desktop brain (Electron) + thin Chrome extension, adapters-as-data. Ground-up v13 rebuild (Stage 0: skeleton + harness).

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p shared/tsconfig.json && tsc -p app/tsconfig.json && tsc -p extension/tsconfig.json
scripts.dist: npm run build && cd app && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:publish: npm run build && cd app && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish always

comment:abi: better-sqlite3 is native: vitest needs the NODE abi (rebuild:node), Electron needs the ELECTRON abi (rebuild:electron — tools/dev.mjs runs it for you). After `npm run dev`, run `npm run rebuild:node` before `npm test`.
